name: Oatmeal Cake and Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Frosting:
Mix together 3/4 cup brown sugar, butter, cream/coconut, and cook until bubbling. Spread over the baked cake.
Cake:
Combine oatmeal and boiling water in a bowl. Mix the remaining ingredients separately. Add the wet mixture to the dry ingredients and combine well. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes in an 9" x 13" pan.
